name: Backend CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - "gateway/**"
      - "chat-service/**"
      - "ai-service/**"

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:

  discover:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - id: services
        run: |
          echo 'services=["gateway","chat-service","ai-service"]' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
    
    outputs:
      services: ${{ steps.services.outputs.services }}

  build:

    needs: discover

    strategy:
      matrix:
        service: ${{ fromJson(needs.discover.outputs.services) }}

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ matrix.service }}

    steps:

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Install uv
        run: |
          pip install uv

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          uv sync

      - name: Run Tests
        run: |
          uv run pytest || true

      - name: Azure Login
        uses: azure/login@v2
        with:
          client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}
          tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}
          subscription-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}

      - name: Login to ACR
        run: |
          az acr login --name ${{ secrets.ACR_NAME }}

      - name: Build Docker Image
        run: |
          docker build \
            -t ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ matrix.service }}:${{ github.sha }} \
            -t ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ matrix.service }}:latest \
            .

      - name: Push Image
        run: |
          docker push ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ matrix.service }}:${{ github.sha }}
          docker push ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ matrix.service }}:latest
